gt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for this game?
page-title: KINGDOM HEARTS Final Mix — Achievement Tracker
kh-title: KINGDOM HEARTS Final Mix — Achievement Tracker
kh-subtitle: Every trophy, Jiminy's Journal entry, synthesis item, treasure, weapon, gummi mission and coliseum cup in one checklist, saved in your browser. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.

trophies.name: Unchanging Armor
trophies.desc: Clear the game without changing equipment.

trophies.name: Undefeated
trophies.desc: Clear the game without using a continue.

trophies.name: Speedster
trophies.desc: Defeat the World of Chaos in the End of the World within 15 hours.

trophies.desc: Defeat the Mysterious Man in Hollow Bastion.

trophies.name: The Cloaked Shadow

trophies.desc: Defeat Sephiroth in the Platinum Match at Olympus Coliseum.

trophies.desc: Collect all Story entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.desc: Collect all Character entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.desc: Collect all 101 Dalmatian entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: Mini-Game Maniac
trophies.desc: Collect all Mini-game entries in Jiminy's Journal.

trophies.name: First Synthesis
trophies.desc: Synthesize an item for the first time.

trophies.name: Gummi Ship Collector
trophies.desc: Obtain 30 or more gummi ship blueprints.

trophies.name: Flying Ace
trophies.desc: Shoot down over 2,500 enemies with your gummi ship.

trophies.name: Customizer
trophies.desc: Modify a gummi ship and update the data.

dalmatians.loc: On a stone across the lake outside Merlin's House. Requires Glide.
Examine Red Trinity 1 in the First District to reach this chest.
On a table.
Right before taking the stairs to Merlin's Study.
On a ledge accessible from Lotus Forest.
On a lillypad near the center of the area.
On a hedge. To get there, go through the passage that is high above in a corner of the Lotus Forest, only reachable with Glide.
Examine Blue Trinity 8 in front of the right gladiator statue.
On the far wall of the area.
In the center of the area.
On a ledge below a wall covered in vines.
Examine Blue Trinity 9 near the lab table.
On a ledge near the passage to Bottomless Hall.
In an alcove near the top of the manor after activating the switch in the Evil Playroom first. After completing this world's story, it will appear in a hole in the center of Manor Ruins.
Examine White Trinity 9 behind the ship's wheel.
Examine Yellow Trinity 3 and interact with the statue.
On top of a pillar near the passage to the Hall. Requires High Jump.
On the highest ledge in the southwest corner. Requires High Jump.
On a platform above the passage to Chamber 2.
Cast Thunder on the pink flowers in the alcove accessible through the painting in Bizarre Room (Sideways).
On a ledge in the left side of the area.
In the corner, in front of a tombstone.
Examine White Trinity 8 near the hill.
Inside the mouth of a pumpkin-shaped decoration. Requires Glide.
On a high platform to the west. Requires High Jump.
At ground level, in front of the passage to Chamber 5.
On a ledge on top of a barrel.
On the upper rafters to the east. Requires Glide.
Green chest after examining Yellow Trinity 4 in the Hold.
Green chest next to the bed.
On a floating platform.
Cast Gravity on the floating chest in the far corner. Requires Glide.
Cast Gravity on the floating chest. You can get here from a passage in Library.

magic.effect: The barrier reflects certain enemy attacks

magic.effect: Enables the use of Showtime, a series of random magical attacks on locked-on targets

magic.effect: Bounces around Sora, dropping large quantities of MP prizes and materials

magic.name: Tinker Bell
magic.effect: Continually regens the party's HP and fully restores Sora's HP if he is defeated (only once per battle)

treasures.name: Thundara-G

treasures.name: Orichalcum

treasures.where: On a hedge. To get there, go through the passage Requires High Jump.

treasures.name: Mythril Shard

treasures.name: Mega-Potion

treasures.name: Mythril

treasures.name: Mega-Ether

treasures.name: Elixir

treasures.name: Mythril

treasures.name: Dark Matter

treasures.name: Mythril Shard

treasures.name: Shield2-G

treasures.name: Rare Fruit

treasures.name: Rare Fruit
treasures.where: Use the see-saw with Roo.

treasures.name: Rare Fruit
treasures.where: Step on a tree stump in the corner to activate a geyser. Jump on the floating tree stump.

treasures.name: Rare Fruit
treasures.where: Step on a tree stump in the corner to activate a geyser. Jump on the floating platform, and from there, jump onto some tree leaves.

treasures.name: Rare Fruit
treasures.where: Use the see-saw with Tigger, then jump or Glide through the branches and tree leaves.

gummim.desc: Obtain a score of 80 or higher.
Set off from Olympus Coliseum, and collect 30 or more shield blocks.
Set off from Hollow Bastion, and get a 0 score while taking no damage. Use of Shield-G and Shield2-G is prohibited.
Obtain a score of 120 or higher.
Set off for Wonderland while using a Haste-G or Haste2-G block, use Accelerate 5 or more times while taking no damage.
Set off from Traverse Town, and collect 40 or more gummi blocks.
Obtain a score of 180 or higher.
Set off from Deep Jungle with only Thundara-G as a weapon. Destroy 70 or more enemy ships.
Set off from Traverse Town, and destroy all 140 obstacles.
Obtain a score of 200 or higher.
Set off from Agrabah, and collect 10 or more special blocks.
Set off from Wonderland with only Thundaga-G as a weapon. Destroy 55 or more enemy ships.
Obtain a score of 330 or higher.
Set off from Wonderland with only Comet-G as a weapon. Destroy 130 or more enemy ships.
Collect 130 or more gummi blocks. Use of Drain-G and Osmose-G is prohibited.
Collect 10 or more armor blocks!
Keep all obstacles intact, and obtain a score of 240 or higher.
Avoid all items, and obtain a score of 260 or higher
Collect 20 or more power blocks!
Destroy 220 or more enemy ships without using the brakes.
Set off from Neverland with only Meteor-G as a weapon. Obtain a score of 550 or higher.
Set off from Atlantica with only Thunder-G as a weapon. Destroy 150 or more enemy ships.
Use 100 or more gummi blocks, and set off from Olympus Coliseum. Arrive in Neverland without taking any damage.
Use 10 or fewer gummi blocks, and set off from Olympus Coliseum. Destroy 777 or more obstacles.
Set off from Neverland with only Ultima-G as a weapon Destroy 130 or more enemy ships.
Obtain a score of 1,600 or higher.
Use Haste2-G 10 or more times without taking damage. Use of Shield-G and Shield2-G is prohibited.
Use 2 or fewer gummi blocks, and arrive without taking any damage or using the brakes.
Use 5 or fewer gummi blocks, and obtain a score of 350 or higher.
Obtain a score of 600 or higher.

note-trinities:
How each Trinity is unlocked:
Trinity Jump — clear Traverse Town.
Trinity Charge — clear Deep Jungle.
Trinity Ladder — clear Agrabah.
Trinity Push — clear the Hercules Cup.
Trinity Detect — after the first boss in Hollow Bastion.
